Headline: #34 South Michigan Temporary Reroute at Michigan/114th
ShortDescription: #34 South Michigan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Michigan, 115th, State, 119th & Michigan due to localized flooding near Michigan/114th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#34 South Michigan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Michigan, 115th, State, 119th and Michigan, then will resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to localized flooding near Michigan/114th.

Headline: Blue Line Delays
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier medical emergency on the tracks near Austin. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are running with residual delays following an earlier medical emergency on the tracks near Austin.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Shuttle buses will remain available between Forest Park and Pulaski to provide connecting service in both directions until 2:00pm.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
